choices.description: Default V3 product app with Scene, SkiaViewer, Elmish, KeyboardInput, Layout, Controls, product tests, and product governance.
Headless Scene-only V3 product for scene/widget authoring.
Governed V3 product with Scene plus Testing helpers.
Sample-oriented V3 product with Scene, SkiaViewer, Elmish, and sample-pack content.

rootNamespace.description: Compatibility parameter accepted by the template; generated project names are derived from --name.

packagePrefix.description: Package prefix reserved for future generated product packages.

skipGitInit.description: Skip automatic Git repository initialization after template creation.

feedback.description: Capture per-phase Spec Kit feedback into specs/<feature>/feedback/ (adds the after_* feedback hooks and the fs-gg-feedback-capture skill). Default false induces no diff.

sources.comment: Feature 060 (FR-003): the emitted docs/api-surface/**/*.fsi tree is the authoritative framework contract surface; copy it verbatim so the sourceName ('Product') substitution does not rewrite framework signatures (e.g. ProductDefect) in the generated reference. Feature 062 (FR-003/005/006): the generated docs/evidence-formats.md and docs/skillist-reference.md references and the authored docs/scaffold-map.md are copied verbatim (no sourceName substitution) so their governance tokens are not rewritten. Feature 108 (FR-020): docs/interactive-readiness.md is copied verbatim for the same reason (its skill names / readiness tokens must not be rewritten).

postActions.description: Make generated shell scripts executable and create the initial Git commit for standalone Spec Kit workflows.

manualInstructions.text: Run 'find . -type f \( -name "*.sh" -o -name "fake.sh" \) -exec chmod +x {} +' and then run 'git init && git add . && git commit -m "[Spec Kit] Initial commit"' if this project is not already inside a Git repository.

args.args: -c "find . -type f \( -name '*.sh' -o -name 'fake.sh' \) -exec chmod +x {} +; if ! command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[fs-gg-ui] git not found; skipped repository initialization' >&2; exit 0; fi; if ! git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1; then git init -q && git add . && git -c user.name='FS GG UI Template' -c user.email='template@example.invalid' commit --allow-empty -q -m '[Spec Kit] Initial commit'; fi"

manualInstructions.text: Run 'find . -type f \( -name "*.sh" -o -name "fake.sh" \) -exec chmod +x {} +' from the generated project root.

postActions.description: Create the initial Git commit for standalone Spec Kit workflows.

manualInstructions.text: Run 'git init && git add . && git commit -m "[Spec Kit] Initial commit"' from the generated project root if this project is not already inside a Git repository.

args.args: -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (-not (Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Write-Warning '[fs-gg-ui] git not found; skipped repository initialization'; exit 0 }; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>$null | Out-Null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { git init -q; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git add .; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git -c user.name='FS GG UI Template' -c user.email='template@example.invalid' commit --allow-empty -q -m '[Spec Kit] Initial commit'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }"
